## What's Changed

- Reworked Tube TV channel playback to use one continuous FFmpeg/HLS engine per channel session.
- Added a rolling HLS playlist for smoother video-to-commercial and commercial-to-video transitions.
- Cleans up idle Tube TV HLS sessions after five minutes and recreates finished sessions on the next tune.
- Fixed compact TV Guide timeline blocks so short commercials no longer visually overlap.
- Moved the custom-channel logo corner selector under the logo preview image.
- Added credits for the tv-logo/tv-logos channel logo catalog.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required.
